message.content:
I‘ve created a FG today and need some active demons on it so we can grind all together and get better

requirements: 
-div 1/2/3
-insane player
-dm with tracker
-have some pr

me: 26k pr combined / 600$
🔓 Named Locations unlocked — **check out <#1210768729395437568> for landmark  + Reload + OG Drop Maps.**

Please be patient to get your role as we **might be asleep or afk you will get your role just wait.**

-  <a:VERIFY:1154289883255423036>  **Use code wavedropmaps in the item shop EVERY 2 weeks to keep ACCESS for the loot routes + tips and tricks. **
